title: Aquatic Shulkers
description: Shulkers generate in deep oceans like clams
body:
Grab your Night Vision and Water Breathing potions, it's time to collect some shells. This mod is intended for players that don't like The End but still want Shulker Boxes.

Shulkers are now:
- Immune to drowning.
- Generate in every deep ocean biome in groups of 3-4.
- Re-textured to be more clam like.
- a fine addition to any aquarium.

Though they are aquatic now they still prefer to teleport to any nearby air blocks adjacent to a solid block. The spawn frequency can be adjusted by overriding the mods builtin datapack.

Locate using: 

```
/locate structure aquatic_shulker:shulker_cluster
```
